title: rubus neerlandicus
intro: Rubus neerlandicus, also known as the Dutch bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease and improving cognitive function. Rubus neerlandicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
